name: The Mind Control Fruit ~ One Piece RPG
description:
NO, YOU DON'T NEED TO WATCH ONE PIECE TO ENJOY THIS BOT (No Spoilers).

ALSO, Disclaimer: This bot is intended to be used with the "Chat Memory Box" in the chat settings. To add your own original characters, One Piece characters, or so that the bot's memory remembers the memorable events in your own adventure. You can just write a character's name, how they look, their powers/abilities (if they have any), a bit about their story (if you want), and their general personality. Try to keep it brief, this bot already has general info about the One Piece world (like the Devil Fruits, Marines, Seastone, what's Haki, etc...)

All you need to know is that in this world, you ate a Devil Fruit that gave you the power of hypnosis, and the only disadvantage is that you can't swim (because all Devil Fruits make you unable to move or use your powers in ocean water). Choose if you want to be a pirate, a marine, or just a normal person chilling. I don't care, just have fun. 👍

Some AI Proxies I recommend: Deepseek (with Openrouter) or Pawan Krd. Just Google or search for video tutorials on how to install any of them.

(Original Art by Ekaki Gaikokujin)
creator: jmjm
